name: floww
title: Floww
description: Vicinae extension for Floww CLI - manage and apply workflows across workspaces
author: dagimg-dot

commands.name: floww
commands.title: floww
commands.subtitle: Manage Floww workflows
commands.description: List, search, and apply Floww workflows for workspace automation.

preferences.name: flowwPath
preferences.title: Floww Binary Path
preferences.description: Custom path to the floww binary. Leave empty to auto-detect in ~/.local/bin/floww or PATH

preferences.name: editorPath
preferences.title: Editor Path
preferences.description: Path to your terminal editor (e.g. /usr/bin/nvim, /usr/bin/vim). Used when editing workflows.
